description: Samples N rows from a KQL table (or materialized view, external table, function). Default count is 10.
notes: Output columns are dynamic — they match the table schema. Use --entity-type materialized-view|external-table|function for non-table entities. Results are always returned as a JSON array of objects keyed by column name.

query_examples.description: Extract a single column from all rows.
Get the number of rows returned.
